SEBI Header

SEBI/HO/MRD/MRD-PoD-1/P/CIR/2024/12

January 15, 2024

CIRCULAR

To all Stock Exchanges, Clearing Corporations, Depositories and Listed Entities

Subject: Enhanced Disclosure Requirements for Listed Entities under SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015

1. In exercise of powers conferred under Section 11(1) of the Securities and Exchange Board of India Act, 1992, read with Regulation 101 of the SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015, SEBI hereby specifies the following enhanced disclosure requirements.

2. All listed entities shall make additional disclosures regarding related party transactions, material events, and corporate governance practices.

3. This circular shall come into force with immediate effect.

SEBI Footer
